Output.SqlQuery: SELECT VALUE root FROM root JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE c0 FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE v0 FROM c0 JOIN v0 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"])))) AS v1 WHERE v1)) AS v2 WHERE v2

SELECT VALUE root FROM root JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE c0 FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE t0 FROM c0 JOIN t0 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"])) WHERE (t0["k"] = "A"))) AS v0 WHERE v0)) AS v1 WHERE v1

SELECT VALUE root FROM root JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE c0 FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE t0 FROM c0 JOIN t0 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"])) WHERE (t0["v"] != null))) AS v0 WHERE v0)) AS v1 WHERE v1

Input.Description: Any - families with children with Things -> Select FamilyId

Output.SqlQuery: SELECT VALUE root["FamilyId"] FROM root JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE c0 FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE v0 FROM c0 JOIN v0 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"])))) AS v1 WHERE v1)) AS v2 WHERE v2
SELECT VALUE c1 FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN c1 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"]))
SELECT VALUE c1["k"] FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN c1 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"]))
SELECT VALUE c1["v"] FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN c1 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"]))

Input.Description: Select - project FamilyId for families with Things

Output.SqlQuery: SELECT VALUE root["FamilyId"] FROM root JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE c0 FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE t0 FROM c0 JOIN t0 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"])) WHERE (t0["k"] = "A"))) AS v0 WHERE v0)) AS v1 WHERE v1

Input.Description: Where - filtered dictionary entries by Key, then Any

Output.SqlQuery: SELECT VALUE root FROM root JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE c0 FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE t0 FROM c0 JOIN t0 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"])) WHERE (t0["k"] = "A"))) AS v0 WHERE v0)) AS v1 WHERE v1

Input.Description: Where - filtered dictionary entries by Value, then Any

Output.SqlQuery: SELECT VALUE root FROM root JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE c0 FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE t0 FROM c0 JOIN t0 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"])) WHERE (t0["v"] != null))) AS v0 WHERE v0)) AS v1 WHERE v1

SELECT TOP 5 VALUE root FROM root JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE c0 FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE v0 FROM c0 JOIN v0 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"])))) AS v1 WHERE v1)) AS v2 WHERE v2 ORDER BY root["FamilyId"] ASC

SELECT VALUE root FROM root JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE c0 FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE v0 FROM c0 JOIN v0 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"])))) AS v1 WHERE v1)) AS v2 WHERE v2 ORDER BY root["FamilyId"] ASC OFFSET 1 LIMIT 3

SELECT VALUE root["FamilyId"] FROM root JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE c0 FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE v0 FROM c0 JOIN v0 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"])))) AS v1 WHERE v1)) AS v2 WHERE v2 ORDER BY root["FamilyId"] ASC

SELECT VALUE root["FamilyId"] FROM root JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE c0 FROM root JOIN c0 IN root["Children"] JOIN ( SELECT VALUE EXISTS( SELECT VALUE v0 FROM c0 JOIN v0 IN ( SELECT VALUE ObjectToArray(c0["Things"])))) AS v1 WHERE v1)) AS v2 WHERE v2 ORDER BY root["FamilyId"] DESC
